description: An SEM manager needs to increase bids for high-performing keywords and decrease them for low-performing ones.

nodes.task_description: Pull a keyword performance report for the last 30 days, including conversion rate.
Identify keywords with a conversion rate above the campaign average and increase their bids by 15%.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully increases bids for the top-performing keywords.

nodes.task_description: Identify keywords with zero conversions and significant spend, and decrease their bids by 20%.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully decreases bids for the poor-performing keywords.
